channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video …
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video into a one-stop entertainment destination, borrowing a strategy from Netflix, which has increasingly embraced party games over the past several years.
item.content:encoded: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video into a one-stop entertainment destination, borrowing a strategy from Netflix, which has increasingly embraced party games over the past several years.

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 日本、約370兆円の賭け──「未来が最初にやってくる国」は再始動するか | Forbes JAPAN …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
日本、約370兆円の賭け──「未来が最初にやってくる国」は再始動するか | Forbes JAPAN 公式サイト（フォーブス ジャパン）

何十年もの間、日本は欧米の想像力の中で「未来が最初にやってくる国」として特別な地位を占めてきた。新幹線、ウォークマン、ロボット犬、アポロ計画以上の演算能力を備えた温水洗浄便座などがその例だ。ところが1990年代のどこかで、未来は中国・深センや米国パロアルトへと引っ越したかのように見え、日本は礼儀正し...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
日本、約370兆円の賭け──「未来が最初にやってくる国」は再始動するか | Forbes JAPAN 公式サイト（フォーブス ジャパン）

何十年もの間、日本は欧米の想像力の中で「未来が最初にやってくる国」として特別な地位を占めてきた。新幹線、ウォークマン、ロボット犬、アポロ計画以上の演算能力を備えた温水洗浄便座などがその例だ。ところが1990年代のどこかで、未来は中国・深センや米国パロアルトへと引っ越したかのように見え、日本は礼儀正し...

item.title: ナンテン まだ赤い実にはなっていないけれど、実がついてきました🫒 （暑くて何載せようか何も考えてなくて適当に選んで…

item.title: #青空ごはん部 #入院中病院食 【 日本歴代第六位 】 猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒 京都の気温は３９.３℃ …
item.author: 園芸の狼 (@gardeningwerewolf.bsky.social)
item.description:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 日本歴代第六位 】

猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒

京都の気温は３９.３℃
観光どころじゃありませんなァ 🫒

愛知県豊田市では４０.８℃
そして静岡県佐久間では日本歴代六位タイ記録となる４１.１℃ を記録、とうとう一線を越えて来ました … 🫒
みなさまも暑気あたりには充分にお気を付けを … 🙇🫒

さてさて、リハビリ体操は自転車運動のペダリングをハードの設定で二十分間、ちょっぴり脚力が付いたみたいで、昨日よりスムーズにヤり遂げました 🫒

明日も無理せず頑張ってチカラを蓄えてゆきたいと思います… 😆🫒

(何故かお昼ご飯の画像ファイルが開かない …)
item.content:encoded:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 日本歴代第六位 】

猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒

京都の気温は３９.３℃
観光どころじゃありませんなァ 🫒

愛知県豊田市では４０.８℃
そして静岡県佐久間では日本歴代六位タイ記録となる４１.１℃ を記録、とうとう一線を越えて来ました … 🫒
みなさまも暑気あたりには充分にお気を付けを … 🙇🫒

さてさて、リハビリ体操は自転車運動のペダリングをハードの設定で二十分間、ちょっぴり脚力が付いたみたいで、昨日よりスムーズにヤり遂げました 🫒

明日も無理せず頑張ってチカラを蓄えてゆきたいと思います… 😆🫒

(何故かお昼ご飯の画像ファイルが開かない …)

item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
こんばんわ🌙ᩚ✩.*˚
今日は夜勤でぶっ続け昼勤も入るんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#こんばんわ
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
#夜の街並

item.title: こんばんは お疲れ様です 今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないか…
item.author: 🦀川口 掌🦀 (@kawaguchitenohira.bsky.social)
item.description:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないかなぁ と、まるで小学生の母親の様なことを呟きつつ

水分補給🥤にしっかりで熱帯夜を乗り越えましょう(*•̀ㅂ•́)و✧

おやすみなさい🌆
item.content:encoded:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないかなぁ と、まるで小学生の母親の様なことを呟きつつ

水分補給🥤にしっかりで熱帯夜を乗り越えましょう(*•̀ㅂ•́)و✧

おやすみなさい🌆

item.title: WNET, parent company of New York PBS station Thirteen, names…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
WNET, parent company of New York PBS station Thirteen, names Edward O'Keefe as its new CEO; O'Keefe was previously VP at CNN and executive producer at ABC News (Benjamin Mullin/New York Times)

item.content:encoded:
WNET, parent company of New York PBS station Thirteen, names Edward O'Keefe as its new CEO; O'Keefe was previously VP at CNN and executive producer at ABC News (Benjamin Mullin/New York Times)

item.title: Good morning. Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning.
Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life are what give us the energy to fly, the necessities to endure.
I hope you have a great day.
#imageandverse #bees #photography #bloomscrolling #flowers #insects #pollinators #ECK #EastCoastKin #mygarden
item.content:encoded:
Good morning.
Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life are what give us the energy to fly, the necessities to endure.
I hope you have a great day.
#imageandverse #bees #photography #bloomscrolling #flowers #insects #pollinators #ECK #EastCoastKin #mygarden

item.title: ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙 今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄 本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をし…
item.author: ｈｉｋｏ１９８１.ｂｓｋｙ.ｓｏｃｉａｌ (@hiko1981.bsky.social)
item.description:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の後半に入り、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴
item.content:encoded:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の後半に入り、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴

item.title: Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who die…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who died after not getting a vitamin K shot: tubes inserted in their airways, blood transfusions.

They’re excruciating to read because they underscore how preventable these deaths could have been.

(Published May)
item.content:encoded:
Autopsies show how hard doctors tried to save babies who died after not getting a vitamin K shot: tubes inserted in their airways, blood transfusions.

They’re excruciating to read because they underscore how preventable these deaths could have been.

(Published May)

item.title: I was reading in public — always risky — and writing notes i…
item.author: Tressie McMillan Cottom (@tressiemcphd.bsky.social)
item.description: I was reading in public — always risky — and writing notes in the margin, as I do. Some guy intervened to tell me that he could never write in a book. Seemed like a personal problem that has nothing to do with me? Anyway, once again daydreaming of walking into the ocean.
item.content:encoded: I was reading in public — always risky — and writing notes in the margin, as I do. Some guy intervened to tell me that he could never write in a book. Seemed like a personal problem that has nothing to do with me? Anyway, once again daydreaming of walking into the ocean.

item.title: The Tehran-backed Houthis have claimed attacks on two Saudi …
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
The Tehran-backed Houthis have claimed attacks on two Saudi Arabian oil tankers in the Red Sea, threatening to open up a new front in the Middle East conflict as the U.S. completed its 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iran.

Read more: cnb.cx/4fit8Q6
item.content:encoded:
The Tehran-backed Houthis have claimed attacks on two Saudi Arabian oil tankers in the Red Sea, threatening to open up a new front in the Middle East conflict as the U.S. completed its 12th consecutive night of strikes on Iran.

Read more: cnb.cx/4fit8Q6

item.title: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adap…
item.author: Colin Dickey (@colindickey.com)
item.description: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.
item.content:encoded: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.

item.title: the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" f…
item.author: nude antifa goat (@goat.sex)
item.description:
the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" framing is hilarious, given that a lot of these divisions were initially formed because men were deeply embarrassed any time a woman beat them at a sport

olympic shooting was mixed gender right up until a woman won the gold
item.content:encoded:
the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" framing is hilarious, given that a lot of these divisions were initially formed because men were deeply embarrassed any time a woman beat them at a sport

olympic shooting was mixed gender right up until a woman won the gold

item.title: FLAVIONOTAS Notas de R$ 1,5 mi de Flávio Bolsonaro entram na…
item.author: Akai (@akaishiri.bsky.social)
item.description:
FLAVIONOTAS
Notas de R$ 1,5 mi de Flávio Bolsonaro entram na mira da PF após ação de Lindbergh.
Deputado pede que investigação do Banco Master passe a apurar pagamentos feitos a empresas ligadas ao grupo de Daniel Vorcaro e solicita rastreamento do fluxo financeiro
iclnoticias.com.br/notas-de-r-1...
item.content:encoded:
FLAVIONOTAS
Notas de R$ 1,5 mi de Flávio Bolsonaro entram na mira da PF após ação de Lindbergh.
Deputado pede que investigação do Banco Master passe a apurar pagamentos feitos a empresas ligadas ao grupo de Daniel Vorcaro e solicita rastreamento do fluxo financeiro
iclnoticias.com.br/notas-de-r-1...

item.title: Pregnant women who resorted to eating mud. A man who had to …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Pregnant women who resorted to eating mud. A man who had to bury his own mother after she died of cholera.

Listen to ProPublica reporters Brett Murphy and @annamaria.bsky.social discuss the fallout of Trump destroying USAID on “Paper Trail.”

(Originally aired on @revealnews.org)
item.content:encoded:
Pregnant women who resorted to eating mud. A man who had to bury his own mother after she died of cholera.

Listen to ProPublica reporters Brett Murphy and @annamaria.bsky.social discuss the fallout of Trump destroying USAID on “Paper Trail.”

(Originally aired on @revealnews.org)
